title: Google map - remove unwanted icons
excerpt:
Hi team, 
could I request that remove those google maps icons like hotels, food, etc. It is confusing sometimes on the map view when mixed with my working items. please see attached.

posts.author: hanwesh (hanwesh)
posts.cookedHtml:
